name: Language Switcher Dropdown
description: Provides a dropdown select to switch between available languages.

suggests.drupal/languageicons: Adds a flag icon next to each language in the dropdown.
suggests.drupal/chosen: Provides the Chosen jQuery widget style.
suggests.harvesthq/chosen: Chosen JS library for the Chosen output type.
suggests.marghoobsuleman/ms-dropdown: msDropdown JS library for the Marghoob Suleman output type.
suggests.ddSlick: ddSlick JS library for the ddSlick flag-image output type.
